contracts.description: Renewal of the 2022 master ahead of expiry — minimum bumped 20% and royalty raised from 10% to 11%.

conditions: Negotiated — no automatic renewal clause in contract
renewalTerm.notes: Initial Term expires 2026-12-31. New license requires separate negotiation.

contracts.fxBasis: Net Sales: HSBC Bank UK quarter-end rate; Payments: FT prior-quarter average
reportingRequirements: Sales Royalty calculation incl. FX conversion

specialClauses.title: Hologram requirement

specialClauses.title: Flagship Store ROFN
specialClauses.detail: If Licensor receives third-party mono-brand store offer, Licensee gets 30-day right of first negotiation + 60-day exclusive negotiation window

amendments.title: Amendment No.1
amendments.summary: JD Royalty 8% added (separate from base 10%); mutual early termination at Year 2 end removed

changes.note: New separate royalty on JD Sports sales

productCategories.name: Underwear

names: TBD per Annex 1 — to be filed per market

conditions: All licensee obligations performed on time and in full
Renewal calc on greater of actual Net Sales vs GMNS
renewalTerm.notes: Definitive specific agreement must be signed by 2027-06-01; not just intent notice.

specialClauses.title: Sleepwear 15% cap
specialClauses.detail: Pajama category capped at 15% of total season sales volume/value

specialClauses.title: Sanction territories
specialClauses.detail: U.S./U.K./E.U. sanction-list countries excluded — but GMR/GMNS minimums not reduced without written amendment

amendments.title: Amendment Agreement No.2
amendments.summary: GMR/GMNS fully restructured · Outstanding GMR €1,820,500 settlement gate (paid by 2025-12-31)

directionPrinciples: Damarindo signature — minimum 2 cues per silhouette

allowedTones: Refined Point Color (sand, off-white, dust rose)

violations.title: Oversized Fit Violation
violations.detail: Shoulder drop +6 cm beyond spec. Violates 26SS principle "No Oversized — Refined Active".
violations.suggestion: Reduce shoulder width by 2 cm and apply Fit Level 2 block. Reference STM25TT-008 (approved).

violations.title: Color — Palette Deviation
violations.detail: Neon green (#84CC16) outside 26SS Elegant Active palette (max chroma 60).
violations.suggestion: Use Tone-on-Tone (charcoal on black) or Refined Point Color from approved swatches.

violations.title: Insufficient Signature Usage
violations.detail: Only 1 brand cue detected. 26SS minimum is 2 Damarindo signature details per silhouette.
violations.suggestion: Add at least 1 Damarindo signature detail — collar piping, cuff stripe, or back-yoke embroidery.

sampleStage.status: AI inspection complete · awaiting human review

aiInspection.name: Silhouette match
aiInspection.detail: Shoulder drop, sleeve length, hem within ±0.5cm of spec

aiInspection.name: Material label
aiInspection.detail: Care label printing slightly off-centre — cosmetic; verify against carton batch

aiInspection.name: Trim & signature cues
aiInspection.detail: Damarindo embroidery + cuff stripe both present and correctly placed

aiInspection.name: Trim & signature cues
aiInspection.detail: All required Damarindo cues correctly placed

violations.title: Signature Cue Borderline
violations.detail: Detected 1.5 Damarindo cues. 26SS requires 2 distinct signatures.
violations.suggestion: Add visible cuff striping or back-yoke embroidery.

productCategories.additionalInfo: Wallets, driving license holders, document folders, checkbooks, credit card holders, key-chains, classic and casual belts, lady bags, lady handbags

aiNotes: Style Code count borderline — recommend rationalisation

activities.purpose: Anchor SS26 around Wimbledon-era heritage with an updated retro court line.
Limited-run pop-up store on King's Road during the Championships.
Capsule with a London-based illustrator for 12 SKUs of court-art tees.
3 macro + 4 micro influencers for sustained heritage-line content.

aiNotes: Reasonable vs prior season ROI (25SS: £164k → 1.18× lift)
Aligned with global "Tennis Heritage Reborn" campaign

activities.purpose: Tie SS26 launch to Roland-Garros — clay-court palette capsule and on-court visibility.
Saint-Honoré flagship re-launch with media + influencer cocktail.
Côte d'Azur capsule with a Nice-based artist for resort-line graphics.
5 lifestyle/sport creators for ongoing capsule visibility.
Hero campaign tied to Italian Open with court-art storytelling and player partnership.
Activation at Tortona Design District tying court heritage to product design.
Drop campaign for the SS26 footwear capsule across digital + print.
5 IT creators sustaining Court Series content beyond hero burst.
Bundesliga-window activation around active wear with tennis-court visual identity.
Mitte pop-up co-located with a local sports retailer.
Austrian alpine resort capsule with a small Vienna brand.
4 mid-tier creators for organic Bundesliga-window content.
Benelux-wide launch leading with court heritage repositioning.
Negen Straatjes pop-up with a local court-art collective.
Outlet-only summer drive to clear SS25 tails before SS26 main floor refresh.
6 micro-creators across FR/NL/BE for sustained activation on a tight budget.

seasonPlans.rejectionReason: Reporting sales projection 23% below Q3 baseline — re-evaluate channel mix and re-submit with revised assumptions.
Account list missing two top-tier DTC partners (Mr Porter, END.) — reassess Tier A coverage and re-submit.
Influencer + media spend mix skews 70/30 — bring media-buy share back above 50% for brand-awareness coverage.

activities.purpose: Drive autumn launch awareness across UK terraces. Lookbook drop pairs with Selfridges + Harrods windows.
Seed 25FW track tops + heritage knitwear with 12 mid-tier London style creators ahead of party season.

messages.author: James Smith
messages.body: Prefer 5-year renewal with current terms. We've delivered 191% of cumulative minimum and would like continuity for the 27SS–SS31 cycle.

messages.author: Min Jung
messages.body: Thank you for the proposal. Given the strong run-rate, please consider a Royalty increase to 11% and Minimum increase to £600K / Q. Happy to share the underlying analysis.

messages.author: James Smith
messages.body: Acknowledged. After CFO review, Best of Britain Ltd can accept Royalty 10.5% and Minimum £560K / Q for a 5-year term — meets us at the midpoint of the proposed uplift.

messages.author: Min Jung
messages.body: Opening offer sent to BDS Distribution — 11.5% royalty, €350K / quarter minimum, 5-year term.

messages.author: Hugo Bernard
messages.body: Counter v1: 11.5% royalty is above what our channel margins can support post-COVID. Asking for 10% royalty and €300K / Q minimum — or a phased ramp from 10% to 11% over years 1–3.

messages.author: Min Jung
messages.body: Renewal opening offer for the 2022 master — royalty stepped up to 11%, quarterly minimum bumped to £600K, 5+5 year renewal option.

0003.verdictRationale: Cumulative minimum 191% · Compliance 94/100 · 4-year YoY +18% · Design pass rate 96%

0004.verdictRationale: Cumulative minimum 98% · Compliance 86/100 · Design pass rate trending down (88% → 76%) · Brand Elevation conditions recommended

0005.verdictRationale: Cumulative minimum 32% · Compliance 61/100 · 3 consecutive quarter Min misses · Design pass rate 54%

auditLog.event: Renewal opening offer sent to Best of Britain Ltd
Sent to Sugi Footwear SpA for review
Sent to BDS Distribution for review
